# F074 Image-Teacher Failure Localization

## Decision
`F074_FAILURE_IS_PERTURBATION_STRUCTURE_LOSS`

## Purpose
F073 weakly aligned the RNA student to the image teacher but did not preserve image-teacher transition behavior. F074 localizes whether the failure is target underfit, transition geometry distortion, or loss of perturbation structure.

## Key Results
- candidate mean image cosine: `0.702079`
- mean train prediction-target cosine: `0.800348`
- candidate minus image recall gap: `-0.333333`
- candidate minus image delta cosine gap: `-0.223070`
- candidate minus image transition gap: `-0.115858`
- candidate minus image perturbation-probe gap: `-0.345679`
- candidate minus observed recall gap: `-0.209877`
- candidate minus observed delta cosine gap: `-0.177244`

## Interpretation
If the RNA student has reasonable image-target cosine but loses perturbation-probe signal and recall, the next branch should add condition/program preserving objectives around the image teacher rather than only increasing model size.

## Promotion Status
No model is promoted. F074 is a read-only failure localization audit.
